actions.value:
Hi {{ticket.requester.first_name}},

 

Edge.app: Bitcoin & Crypto Wallet (formerly Airbitz), is a completely separate company from Edge Impulse.

 

To reach their support, please try heading over to https://edgeimpulse.com/contact to get any assistance with your AI product engineering questions.

-

If you want get started with cryptocurrencies in an easy and secure way, download our app (https://edge.app/get-started) and become a coin holder, too! Our line is open if you have any questions.
